briefdescription.para: Encode clock type, mclk bus, mclk mask bit, gclk pch and instance number, to clock subsystem.

listitem.para: 20..25 (6 bits): mclkmaskreg following values MCLKMSK0 (0) MCLKMSK1 (1) MCLKMSK2 (2)

26..31 (6 bits): type following values SUBSYS_TYPE_XOSC (0) SUBSYS_TYPE_DFLL48M (1) SUBSYS_TYPE_PLL (2) SUBSYS_TYPE_PLL_OUT (3) SUBSYS_TYPE_RTC (4) SUBSYS_TYPE_XOSC32K (5) SUBSYS_TYPE_GCLKGEN (6) SUBSYS_TYPE_GCLKPERIPH (7) SUBSYS_TYPE_MCLKDOMAIN (8) SUBSYS_TYPE_MCLKPERIPH (9)

parameterdescription.para: select from the AHBx and the APBx buses
select the module connected to AHBx or APBx bus (0 to 31)
gclk peripheral channel number m in PCHTRLm (0 to 63)
instance number of the specified clock type

briefdescription.para: List clock subsystem IDs for pic32ck_sg_gc family.

detaileddescription.para: Clock subsystem IDs. To be used in devicetree nodes, and as argument for clock API.
